Tips_nokey: Out of keys. Watch a video to get a key.
Tips_failTip: Only levels you've successfully cleared can be shared with other players
Tips_BlockNotEnugh: You need to create at least 3 obstacles to try it out
Tips_fengjiLimit: You can only create up to 5 fans
Tips_BlockEnugh: You can only create up to 50 obstacles
Tips_NoEnergy: Not enough challenge energy. Watch a video to get 5 energy
Tips_LevelLimit: You can only create levels after successfully sharing a recording once. Go challenge a level and share a recording now.
Tips_LevelLimitPlay: You can only challenge levels shared by other players after successfully sharing a recording once. Go challenge a level and share a recording now.
Tips_successTip: Congrats on your successful challenge! Upload the level to the server now and let all players take it on.
Tips_noChapters: You haven't created your own level yet, go create one now
Tips_noAuth: You declined authorization, so the level can't be uploaded. Tap the menu in the top-right corner - Settings, to re-authorize your user info.
Tips_uploadSuccess: Level creation complete. Other players can only play your level after you successfully share a recording. Go share a recording now.
Tips_uploadfail:
Sorry!
Level upload failed, please try again later.
Tips_listfail:
Sorry!
Failed to fetch level, please try again later.

You've used up your level creation attempts.
Watch a video to keep creating levels.
Tips_end: The player challenge hall is now open. You can challenge levels made by other players, or create your own.
Tips_destroyTips: Enter "Infinite Ball Bounce: Dark Edition" from the "More Games" list to destroy this level!
